# SLA & Penalty Settlement Engine

SLA & Penalty Settlement Engine turns supplier SLA breaches into auditable, collectible credit notes. It can run standalone with manual rule entry, CSV import, and generated credit-note PDFs, or integrate with the surrounding portfolio for automated breach ingestion and settlement posting.

## Architecture
- F# 8 on ASP.NET Core 8 with Giraffe handlers.
- PostgreSQL 16 stores tenant-scoped rules, events, append-only penalty ledger, settlements, outbox, ingestion runs, and audit log.
- Redis handles rate limiting and idempotency cache; Hangfire uses PostgreSQL backing for durable jobs.
- Razor Pages + HTMX + Tailwind provide the ops console.
- QuestPDF renders settlement credit notes.

## API Surface
- `GET /api/health`, `/api/health/db`, `/api/health/redis`, `/api/health/ready`
- `POST /api/tenants/register`, `GET /api/tenants/me`
- `/api/contracts`, `/api/sla-clauses`, `/api/breaches`, `/api/ledger`, `/api/settlements`, `/api/counterparties`, `/api/audit`
- `POST /api/breaches/from-hub` for HMAC-verified Hub ingress

## Integrations
- Contract Lifecycle Engine via NATS JetStream and REST backfill
- Invoice Reconciliation Engine for credit-note/debit-memo posting
- Notification Hub for settlement/dispute notifications
- Workflow Engine for dispute escalation playbooks
- VPI for supplier penalty signals

## Commands
- Install: `dotnet restore Slapen.sln`
- Develop: `dotnet watch --project src/Slapen.Api`
- Test: `dotnet test`
- Format: `dotnet fantomas .`
